☁️ Cloud Control API

RESTful APIs for Cloud Infrastructure, Services & Scraping

v3.0.0 Live specs — auto-generated from C3 API + Services API
Dashboards: C3 Dashboard | Cloud Portal | Crawlee | Matomo | Mailu · Specs: C3 API | Services API

Key Endpoints — C3 API /c3-api

  • Health: GET /health/status
  • Topology: GET /topology
  • Drift: GET /health/drift
  • Up check: GET /up/{target}
  • VM Control: POST /vms/{vmId}/start|stop|reset
  • Containers: POST /vms/{vmId}/containers/{name}/start|stop
  • Profiling: GET /v2/profiling/{target}
  • Tests: GET /tests/run/{suite}
  • Security: GET /security/scan
  • Cloud: GET /cloud/summary

Key Endpoints — Services API /services

  • Registry: GET /
  • Service proxy: POST /{service}/proxy
  • Matomo: GET /matomo/visits
  • Mailu: GET /mailu/domains
  • Syncthing: GET /syncthing/status
  • ntfy: POST /ntfy/publish
  • Ollama: POST /ollama/chat
  • Radicale: GET /radicale/calendars

Crawlee API /crawlee (independent API — spec at /crawlee/docs/json)

  • Actors: GET/POST /v2/acts
  • Run actor: POST /v2/acts/{actorId}/runs
  • Runs: GET /v2/actor-runs
  • Run status: GET /v2/actor-runs/{runId}
  • Dataset: GET /v2/actor-runs/{runId}/dataset/items
  • Logs: GET /v2/actor-runs/{runId}/logs
  • Abort: POST /v2/actor-runs/{runId}/abort
  • Dashboard: api.diegonmarcos.com/crawlee/

Cloud Control API © 2025 Diego Nepomuceno Marcos

Built with Swagger UI
